test_expression: matches!(aero_codex_life_support::brlss_backbone::equivalent_system_mass(aero_codex_life_support::brlss_backbone::EquivalentSystemMassInput { installed_mass_kg: 100.0, pressurized_volume_m3: 2.0, power_kw: 3.0, cooling_kw: 4.0, crew_time_h: 5.0, volume_equiv_kg_per_m3: 10.0, power_equiv_kg_per_kw: 20.0, cooling_equiv_kg_per_kw: 30.0, crew_time_equiv_kg_per_h: 40.0 }), Ok(value) if value.value == 500.0)

matches!(aero_codex_life_support::melissa_photobioreactor::limnospira_tic_rate(aero_codex_life_support::melissa_photobioreactor::LimnospiraTicRateInput { dilution_rate_per_s: 1.0, total_inorganic_carbon_in: 3.0, total_inorganic_carbon: 2.0, specific_carbon_uptake_per_biomass_s: 0.5, biomass_concentration: 2.0, kla_co2_per_s: 1.0, saturation_co2: 4.0, dissolved_co2: 3.0 }), Ok(value) if (value.value - 1.0).abs() <= 1.0e-15)

matches!(aero_codex_life_support::thinfilm_algal_biofilm::biofilm_light_from_layers(100.0, &[aero_codex_life_support::thinfilm_algal_biofilm::LightAttenuatingLayer { thickness_m: 1.0, active_biomass: 2.0, eps_or_matrix: 3.0, kappa_active: 0.1, kappa_eps: 0.2 }]), Ok(value) if (value.value - 100.0 * (-0.8_f64).exp()).abs() <= 1.0e-12)
